name: input-group-textarea
visual_summary: The input-group-textarea is a multi-line text input field used for collecting detailed information from users. It is ideal for taking user feedback, comments, or longer-form text input in applications. Use this component when you need to facilitate longer text interactions with users.
generation_prompt:
